opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My chest and face are on fire, and my throat feels dry and scratchy when I breathe.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The gas barbeque flared up in my face about half an hour ago, my chest has already blistered, and now my voice has gone hoarse and my throat feels tight.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 30 minutes ago, when I went to light the outdoor gas barbeque and it flared up in a burst of flame
symptom_narrative.duration: about half an hour and my throat feels like it's tightening up
symptom_narrative.character: intense burning pain across the front of my chest and my face; the skin on my chest blistered up almost straight away, and my voice has gone hoarse and croaky
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain is awful, some of the worst I've felt, and I'm really frightened about my breathing
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: front of my chest and my face; my throat feels tight and scratchy inside
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it happened; the throat tightness feels like it's slowly getting worse
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: I ran cool water over my chest for about 5 minutes before I called for help
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: talking makes my throat feel worse, and the air moving over the blisters stings badly
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I coughed up some dark sooty stuff not long after it happened, my voice is hoarse, and I feel like there's a lump/tightness in my throat
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't sit still, I'm pacing around, and I'm too distressed and sore to do anything

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: was lighting a gas barbeque at home when it flared up; spouse is with me and made the call

objective_data_offered.value: red and blistered skin over the front of the chest and the lower face, with some skin peeling; the face and chest look swollen
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/carer video description only — depth and body-surface-area extent cannot be judged over chat

objective_data_offered.value: singed nasal hair and singed eyebrows
hoarse, croaky voice and a scratchy, tight feeling in the throat when breathing
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: voice change and throat tightness after a facial flash burn are concerning for airway involvement but cannot be confirmed remotely

objective_data_offered.value: spouse says he coughed up dark, sooty material shortly after the barbeque flared up
spouse reports he is very distressed, sweaty and pacing, and is breathing faster than normal but is still talking in full sentences
the barbeque fire is out and the area is safe; cool water was run over the chest for about 5 minutes
